description_long: This is a modern two-story brick house with a flat and partially gabled roof, featuring large rectangular windows on both floors. The front facade includes a driveway with two parked cars, a small front yard with a tree, and a white fence enclosing the property. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a patio area, greenery, and a covered section. The exterior walls are primarily red brick, complemented by white and gray accents, and the windows are framed in black. The house is set on a rectangular plot with paved and landscaped areas, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and functional outdoor spaces. The main entrance is centrally located, accessible via a short walkway from the driveway.
description: A modern two-story red brick house with large black-framed windows, a flat and gabled roof, and a fenced yard with driveway and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with two cars, front yard tree, and white fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard, patio area, and the extent of the white perimeter fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, covered patio, and large windows on both floors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, additional landscaping, and the side of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a single door, small paved approach, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and a driveway.
